raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2 is resting on top of box_1 with its left and right faces unobstructed. There is at least 15 cm of free lateral space on both sides for the end-effectors to slide in, and the vertical space above the stack is clear so the box can be lifted. The attachment between the two boxes is non-rigid and can be overcome by a gentle upward pull.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is detached from box_1 and securely held between the two end-effectors."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "clear tabletop area 30 cm front-left of box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding box_2 and the designated placement region on the tabletop is free of objects and provides a stable support surface.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is placed flat on the specified tabletop area and released, leaving the space above and around box_1 unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is now fully exposed with no objects on top. Both lateral faces are accessible and there is clearance above for lifting. Both end-effectors are free to engage the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is firmly held between the two arms and lifted off the tabletop, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2 is resting on top of box_1 with its left and right faces unobstructed. There is at least 15 cm of free lateral space on both sides for the end-effectors to slide in, and the vertical space above the stack is clear so the box can be lifted. The attachment between the two boxes is non-rigid and can be overcome by a gentle upward pull.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is detached from box_1 and securely held between the two end-effectors.

parsed_json.Target: clear tabletop area 30 cm front-left of box_1
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding box_2 and the designated placement region on the tabletop is free of objects and provides a stable support surface.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is placed flat on the specified tabletop area and released, leaving the space above and around box_1 unobstructed.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is now fully exposed with no objects on top. Both lateral faces are accessible and there is clearance above for lifting. Both end-effectors are free to engage the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is firmly held between the two arms and lifted off the tabletop, completing the pick-up task.
